title: How You Remind Me
why_this_song: How You Remind Me by Nickelback (2001) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "remind" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "remind" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "really" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Never made it as a wise man
And it must have been so bad
And this is how you remind me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Tired of livin' like a blind man
Been to the bottom of every bottle
I was waitin' on a different story

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Nickelback one question about "How You Remind Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Nickelback sobre "How You Remind Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "How You Remind Me" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "How You Remind Me" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "How You Remind Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "How You Remind Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
